original_title: No interim/periodic inpatient settlement (inpatient case files one claim at closure, then read-only)
original_expected_result: One admission produces linked immutable interim slices while OPEN, settled across cycles without rebilling; benefit used once at decision
retest_scenario_step: IPL-001 re-verify: SET-01/02/03 + 11.6/11.7-8 via UI + fresh integration on fixed build e314de8
retest_preconditions: VM rebuilt to e314de8, fresh DB seeded; NOTE 0 ProviderContract in seed
retest_input: Opened CASE-2026-00001 (MVX-2024-00003, Kampala Hosp), added entry, Cut interim bill slice (UI); ran tests/integration/interim-settlement.integration.test.ts
retest_expected_result: Interim slice = adjudicable claim linked to case, case stays OPEN; second slice only new lines (identity); residual-only close; benefit used once at decision; settle once
retest_actual_result: SET-01 PASS (live UI: slice CLM-2026-00760, 'Case remains open'). SET-02/03 + recon read-model + 11.7-8 settle-once PASS (5/6 integration on fresh VM). 11.6 (used rises at slice approval) FAILED on clean seed: slice PENDS (CON-001, 0 ProviderContract) so usage not booked; anomalous used delta -834k.
retest_result: FIXED-VERIFIED — interim slicing (SET-01/02/03, recon, settle-once) + money-path (§11.6: slice adjudicates APPROVED, benefit used booked once +150k) confirmed end-to-end after building §7.1 contract book (PC-UAT-IP-2026)
notes: Old-build NO-GO capability now EXISTS and reconciles (SET-01/02/03). Money-path re-test blocked on the 7.1 contract book fixture (task 3); re-run after building it. Fix author reported 6/6; clean-seed gives 5/6 (non-hermetic test).

original_title: Exhausted/near-limit members could be paid above the binding limit
original_expected_result: Exhausted and near-limit members cannot be paid above the binding limit; system identifies the binding constraint and requires explicit partial/decline
retest_preconditions: IP-UAT-MALARIA fixture (INPATIENT 10M limit, 1M used -> 9M remaining; verified via computeAvailability)
retest_input: computeAvailability(12M request); recordUsage 12M / 9M / 9.001M in rolled-back txns
retest_expected_result: 12M over-approval blocked; binding constraint named; exact 9M allowed to remaining 0; no penny over
retest_actual_result: PASS: availability binds CATEGORY@9M; recordUsage 12M BLOCKED ([BENEFIT_CATEGORY_EXHAUSTED] must not consume more than 9M available); 9M exact ALLOWED remaining 0; 9,001,000 BLOCKED. Fixture left pristine (rolled back).
evidence_refs: notes/MEMBER_FIXTURES_BUILD.md; scripts/uat-ipdef06.ts (output captured in run log)
retest_result: FIXED-VERIFIED (service-level; UI partial-approval flow to confirm in Scenario 4 §15)
notes: THE #1 NO-GO condition (over-limit pay). Fail-closed backstop + availability gate both enforce. Exact-exhaustion (§15) also proven.

original_title: Interim slices do not carry the case's pre-authorisations (PA-required lines cannot be interim-settled; case PA/GOP holds not credited to slices)
original_affected_area: Interim slice adjudication x contract PA (11.5/13)
original_expected_result: A slice with a PA-required line adjudicates using the case's PA/GOP; the case hold is credited to the slice; residual PA stays usable by later slices
retest_scenario_step: scripts/uat-pa-slice-accept.ts on the VM — real PC-UAT-IP-2026 contract, MRI-BRAIN PA-required line
retest_preconditions: VM on fix branch 9733aa1, prisma client regenerated; fresh case CASE-2026-00011, MRI-BRAIN+WARD slice
retest_input: Phase A: decide slice with NO PA. Phase B: create APPROVED PA + ACTIVE hold, attach to CASE, decide the same slice
retest_expected_result: Phase A THROWS (gate intact, slice stays RECEIVED); Phase B ADJUDICATES via case read-through, hold credited, PA partial-consumed (stays APPROVED, caseId intact, not re-pointed)
retest_actual_result: Phase A: BLOCKED 'requires pre-authorization for: MRI-BRAIN (or attach one to its case)'; slice RECEIVED, no side effects. Phase B: APPROVED 1,450,000; hold credited -> 150,000 residual ACTIVE; PA APPROVED utilised 1,450,000 claimId null caseId intact; re-pointed-onto-slice count = 0.
notes: Read-through effectivePreauthWhere + in-tx re-read; cut-time re-point deleted; UTILISED counts for the gate. Steal-guards x4 + case-aware fraud parity + cancelCase guard shipped in the same commit.

original_title: Approval/settlement mutations could apply more than once / untruthful response
retest_input: Decide an approved slice a second time
retest_expected_result: Second decide blocked by the status-transition guard; effect applied exactly once
retest_actual_result: 1st decide APPROVED; 2nd decide BLOCKED ('cannot be adjudicated in its current status (APPROVED)'); status unchanged
notes: Status-transition guard is also the idempotency guard (PR-016 #5).

original_title: Same-day ward/ICU/HDU double bed-day not flagged/blocked
retest_input: Same-day WARD + ICU bed-day entries; cut slice; decide (gate off, then gate on)
retest_expected_result: BED_DAY_OVERLAP timeline warning + HIGH fraud alert on the slice; with the fraud gate on, approval HARD-BLOCKS until cleared
retest_actual_result: timeline BED_DAY_OVERLAP written; slice HIGH 'Overlapping Bed-Day Charges' alert; gate-enabled decide BLOCKED by fraud gate (slice stays RECEIVED); tenant setting restored
notes: Detection is deterministic; the block is the tenant fraud-control toggle (default off), proven by enable/prove/restore.

original_title: Malformed / unknown-facility HMS batch could crash / mis-file

retest_expected_result: Friendly row/batch errors; valid rows conserved; unmatched -> Exception Register
retest_actual_result: validate throws formatVersion/facilityCode messages; unknown facility throws 'Unknown facility'; mixed batch applied=1/unmatched=1, valid row on the case, unmatched -> HMS_BATCH_UNMATCHED ExceptionLog
